## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI / Infrastructure

## Provider Impact

If this change affects a provider or adds a new one, please specify:

- [ ] New provider added
- [ ] Existing provider modified: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
- [ ] No provider changes

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] SIMULATE mode test passed
- [ ] Backend unit tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing with real provider (if applicable)

Test configuration:

```env
SIMULATE_MODE=true
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style
- [ ] I have added type hints for new Python functions
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, SOP files, integration docs)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have verified the change works in SIMULATE mode

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that might help reviewers understand this change.
